prompt: Refactor OAD_open in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c to free oadCCCDTable and call mq_close on hOadQ before returning early if GATTServApp_RegisterService fails — right now both resources leak on that error path.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
